chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3478 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.14688 of 2025 (Urgency) 2. For orders on office objection No. 1 to 5. 3. For orders on Misc. No.14689 of 2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case. 24.07.2025 Khawaja Muhammad Azeem, Advocate for the Petitioner. --------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. After arguing at some length, counsel for the petitioner submits that the instant petition may be disposed of by directing the Respondents to complete the process of election within a period of three months as it has already been ordered through notification dated 15th July, 2025. Mr. K.A Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh present in court in another matter, waives the notice of the petition and raises no objection for such directions. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of with directions to the Respondents to conclude the process of election within a period of three months as already ordered through notification dated 15th July, 2025. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
